language.title: Language Settings
language.saveFailed: Failed to switch language, please try again

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this operator?
deleteConfirm.description: Operators with associated transactions cannot be deleted

pinManager.title: PIN Enabled
pinManager.description: A 4-digit PIN is required to unlock the app on each startup

autoLock.title: Auto Lock
autoLock.description: Automatically lock the app after a period of inactivity

messages.changeFailed: Failed to change PIN, please try again

import.title: Excel Import
import.confirmContent: Import will clear all existing transaction and operator data. This operation cannot be undone. Continue?

export.title: Data Export
export.noRecordsHint: Please adjust filters and try again

dangerous.title: Dangerous Operations
dangerous.clearDescription: Delete all transaction records and operators, keep category settings
dangerous.clearConfirmContent: This will delete all transaction records and operator data, while preserving category settings. This operation cannot be undone. Continue?
dangerous.clearSuccessMessage: All transactions and operators have been cleared
dangerous.resetDescription: Clear all data and restore to initial state
dangerous.resetConfirmContent: This will clear all data (transactions, operators, custom categories) and restore to initial installation state. This operation cannot be undone. Continue?

messages.importSuccess: Successfully imported {{count}} records, returning to data view...

modal.descriptionExtra: Helps MCP tools match categories semantically, e.g.: takeout, dine-in, cafeteria

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this category?
deleteConfirm.description: Categories with associated transactions will be disabled instead of deleted

messages.softDeleted: Category has associated transactions and has been disabled

safeStorageMissing.title: OS keyring unavailable
safeStorageMissing.description: Moneta requires the OS keyring (macOS Keychain / Windows DPAPI / Linux Secret Service) to safely store S3 credentials. Enable the keyring and restart the app — sync is disabled until then.

fields.prefixHint: Lets multiple users share one bucket, e.g. moneta/
fields.pathStyleHint: Self-hosted MinIO usually needs this enabled
fields.autoSyncIntervalHint: While the app is open, sync runs in the background at this interval; a sync is also attempted at launch and before quit
fields.credentialsExistHint: Credentials saved — leave blank to keep them
fields.credentialsNewHint: Credentials are stored encrypted via the OS keyring

clearCredentials.title: Clear stored credentials?
clearCredentials.content: You will need to re-enter the Access Key to sync again.

resetCloud.title: Wipe all cloud data?
resetCloud.content: Deletes the cloud manifest, key envelope, database, and all backups. Local data is untouched, but the next sync will require running 'Initial Setup' again.

changePassphrase.title: Change Sync Passphrase
changePassphrase.info: Changing the passphrase only re-wraps the cloud key envelope. Your local database key and synced data are untouched. Other already-joined devices keep working without entering the new passphrase; only future devices joining for the first time will need it.

setup.initialWarning: Initial setup wraps your local database key with the sync passphrase and uploads it to the cloud. Keep the passphrase safe — losing it means cloud data cannot be recovered on a new device.
setup.joinWarning: 'Cloud overwrites local': use the passphrase to unwrap the cloud key, replace your local database key, and download the remote database. Local data will be overwritten.
setup.adoptLocalWarning: 'Local overwrites cloud': reset the cloud with this device's data, using the passphrase you enter as the new sync passphrase. The previous cloud data will be replaced.
setup.directionHint: Both local and cloud have data — pick which side wins
setup.directionUseRemote: Cloud overwrites local (recommended: this is a new device)
setup.directionUseLocal: Local overwrites cloud (this device has newer data)
setup.passphraseHintInitial: At least 8 characters; pick a strong one. Never stored locally or remotely — only used to derive an encryption key.
setup.passphraseHintJoin: Enter the same passphrase used during initial setup on the other device
setup.passphraseHintAdoptLocal: Set a new sync passphrase (the previous cloud passphrase will be invalidated)

messages.testSuccess: Connection successful — bucket is readable and writable
messages.safeStorageUnavailable: OS keyring unavailable, cannot save credentials
messages.passphraseTooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters
messages.passphraseSame: New passphrase is the same as current

conflict.title: Conflict detected
conflict.warning: Both local and remote have unsynced changes. Pick which side wins — the loser is archived under backups/.
